reviews.review_description: I can't stop playing. I just love the game so much... the game in general just doesn't feel janky and laggy. I do think the game needs a little bit of a boost in players but overall it's my favorite fan game. The maps look amazing. The people I've met are really nice. And it's just the best experience I've had in a while. Since it's new I expected more bugs but it isn't all that big. But I for sure recommend this game. 👌 👍

This is made by my friend Dre1mer. He works very hard on making this game and the other projects he works on. I recommend trying out this game because it can be fun and entertaining while playing with friends.
